raw_transcript: It's impossible, Dr. Chen. My sugar is high one minute, then it crashes. And my stomach... I'm so bloated. I eat three bites of breakfast and I feel like I've eaten a Thanksgiving turkey. I have no appetite.
final_corrected_note: It's impossible, Dr. Chen. My sugar is high one minute, then it crashes. And my stomach... I'm so bloated. I eat three bites of breakfast and I feel like I've eaten a Thanksgiving turkey. I have no appetite.
